Name: Lundbeckfonden / Lundbeck Foundation
Description:
We are an active enterprise foundation.
Hans Lundbeck founded the company H. Lundbeck in 1915. In 1954, his widow, Grete Lundbeck, established the Lundbeck Foundation and transferred her shares in H. Lundbeck to the Foundation as the couple had no heirs.

Today the Lundbeck Foundation is driven by our dedication to neuroscience.

We work to bring discoveries to lives. People and patients lies at the heart of what we do. We unleash the potential of exceptional ideas and talented researchers by supporting the commercial journey from labs to lives, from start-up to exit – or to inclusion in the Lundbeck Foundation portfolio of long-term ownerships within healthcare.

Name: Istanbul Gayrimenkul Degerleme
Description:
IGD was established in year 2005, to provide real estate valuation and real estate consultancy services. Since 2006, it continues its activities under the title Istanbul Real Estate Valuation & Consulting Inc. IGD is a “Board Listed” valuation agency by Capital Markets Board of Turkey (CMB) and Banking Regulation and Supervision Agency (BRSA).

IGD provides valuation, consulting, project development, market research, feasibility study, highest and best use analysis, machinery valuation, real estate damage assessment, real estate legal consulting services, with its licensed valuers as well as a strong set of consultants comprising academicians providing scientific support.
IGD provides reporting compliant with International Real Estate Valuation Standards (IVS).

In accordance with the relevant communiqué under Capital Markets Board regulations, IGD provides independent and impartial reporting of the potential value at a certain date of a real estate, a real estate project, or the rights and benefits to derive from a real estate.

Name: Polar Structure AB
Description:
Polar Structure is a purpose-driven investor, and founder of new companies, that develops and owns infrastructure for tomorrow. We have a long-term and responsible ownership model where we enable the transition for both the private and public sector. We do so by offering sustainable infrastructure “as-a-Service”.

We have a holistic investment approach where we select investments based on how they add value to the overall Polar Structure ecosystem. Investment areas include solutions within railway, logistics, land, energy and digital solutions. By addressing various industry challenges, such as the underinvestment in the efficiency and maintenance of the railway, or the effect and distribution issue in the energy grid, we can create change on many levels. Our approach has a strong focus on digital solutions and connectivity that can drive resource efficiency and impact throughout our portfolio. This is valuable since the infrastructure sector historically has had a very low level of digitalization.

We are founders – and majority owners – of new companies that address unmet needs in the market. We also make minority investments in companies that we see have a potential to add value to the Polar Structure ecosystem.

Ett samarbete med Parkit ger dig nöjdare kunder och högre parkeringsintäkter. Det är det smidigaste sättet att öka försäljning och ordervärde. Du får alltid betalt med Parkit, det blir inte enklare än så. Våra allt-i-ett-lösningar med betalningsalternativ och smarta funktioner kommer att öka dina intäkter. Och antalet nöjda kunder. En komplett parkeringsleverantör!

Name: Torsboda Industrial Park
Description:
100 % GREEN ENERGY AND PROBABLY BEST PRICE IN EUROPE

Are you looking for a secure site with perfect climate, great logistics and low energy prices?

TORSBODA is located in the middle of Sweden, a country known for its abundant forests and lakes, keen recyclers, hikers and ”ka” lovers. But it’s also a nation with a stable political landscape, an advantageous climate and a low risk of natural disasters and terrorism.
You’ll find us by the coast of the Bothnian Sea, a place with perfect temperature for energy-intensive industries.

The +250 MW green energy, provided at our site, comes at one of the lowest cost in Europe. With three cities within 30 minutes, and a university intimately bound up with the industry, we can ensure you good competence and skills supply.

The new logistic park in the region will be one of the most important industrial hubs in Sweden. Its up-to-date logistic solutions for large scale industry will facilitate all kinds of transportation. With strong industrial tradition, business-friendy climate and ever improved infrastructure, we take pride in the collaboration for growth. A dedicated team, just ready to start, will support you throughout your project.

So don’t hesitate to get in touch. We are probably your best option.

TORSBODA IS PROBABLY YOUR BEST OPTION.

Name: Bridgeford Trust Company
Description:
Bridgeford Trust Company is a fully independent trust company chartered in South Dakota, providing conflict-free and innovative trust and fiduciary services and progressive U.S. modern trust law solutions around asset protection, privacy, and tax planning to domestic and international families worldwide.

Now the oldest and largest independently owned South Dakota chartered trust company, we leverage over 140 years of combined legal, accounting, and trust administrative experience, executed through our talented and growing staff of fiduciary professionals.

South Dakota is consistently ranked among the top U.S. trust jurisdictions, renowned for its progressive and cutting-edge trust laws. Bridgeford's clients benefit from advanced asset protection, dynasty trust capabilities, and the flexibility to hold non-traditional assets in trusts. Additionally, South Dakota’s privacy provisions and directed trust statutes are among the best in the country, enabling our clients to work confidentially with their chosen financial advisors or investment managers in the administration of trust assets.

Bridgeford Trust Company delivers far more direction and control to clients and their advisors than ever before because of South Dakota’s modern trust laws. Learn more about the South Dakota Advantage at: www.bridgefordtrust.com/southdakotaadvantage.

Name: Trustee
Description:
PROVEEMOS SERVICIOS DE TRUSTEE DE UNA MANERA PROFESIONAL Y ETICA CON MAS MODERNA TECNOLOGIA
Proporcionando absoluta seguridad, para que sus instrucciones sean completadas de manera eficiente y precisa.
Contamos con prestigiosas certificaciones en el área de contabilidad, tesorería y administración de trusts
cumpliendo con estrictos códigos de ética y ejercicio profesional.

SERVICIOS DE TRUSTEE
Nosotros seremos el administrador de su Trust establecido en los Estados Unidos

QUÉ ES UN "TRUSTEE"
Un Trustee administra los activos aportados al trust, cumpliendo las instrucciones del creador del Trust (Trustor or Grantor)
Estableciendo un Trust, usted podrá administrar, proteger y transferir de manera segura y eficiente, seguros de vida, propiedades, activos financieros, empresas e inversiones
Utilizando los servicios de Trustee, usted podra utilizar esta poderosa herramienta de manera simple y económica.

A QUIÉN SERVIMOS
Nuestros clientes son personas de origen latino que viven en EEUU o en países de Latinoamérica y que desean crear y administrar diversos tipos de Trusts en el estado de la Florida (Estados Unidos)

2016 spelades första upplagan av tävlingen. Tävlingen spelas 2026 den 21 maj på Barsebäck.

Name: The Carmen Flores Canchola Trust
Description:
We are a Southern Arizona-based business founded by a family with a rich history of entrepreneurship and philanthropy. The remarkable life of José Canchola & Carmen Canchola founded our company.
José's story is one of perseverance and achievement. Born to immigrant parents in Kansas, he moved to Chicago at a young age and started his career as a paperboy in the financial district. Through hard work and determination, he became a successful investment banker, eventually becoming the first Hispanic member of the New York Stock Exchange.
In addition to his work in finance, José also made his mark in the restaurant industry, owning multiple restaurants and commercial real estate in Arizona. He was a beloved community member known for his generosity, hosting annual Christmas parties for children from Mexico and supporting numerous charitable causes.
José's & Carmen's legacy of philanthropy continues today, as our company is committed to giving back to our community and positively impacting the world. We are proud to honor his memory by upholding his values of hard work, integrity,  inclusivity, and compassion in all that we do.
Thank you for joining us on this journey. We hope that José's & Carmen's story serves as an inspiration to you as well.

Das Be- und Verwertungskonzept mit vier Büros gewährleistet die bundesweite, synergetische Verwertungsoptimierung bei gleichzeitiger Präsenz Ihres persönlichen Verwertungspartners vor Ort.

Das originäre Tätigkeitsfeld der Perlick Industrieauktionen GmbH beginnt mit einer detaillierten, EDV-gestützten Sachaufnahme gemäß den Inventarvoraussetzungen der InsO unterteilt in Anlagevermögen mit Maschinen und technischen Anlagen, Betriebs- und Geschäftsausstattungen sowie Fuhrpark sowie dem Umlaufvermögen mit Roh-, Hilfs- und Betriebsstoffen, fertigen Erzeugnissen und Waren und sonstigen Vermögensgegenständen. Industrieauktionen
Daneben vermarkten wir im Fall einer Insolvenz, Betriebsaufgabe oder Sanierung die gesamte Betriebs- und Geschäftsausstattung mittels internationaler Industrieauktionen, Komplett- oder Einzelverkäufen. Mit Hilfe unseres internationalen Kontaktnetzes und unserer umfassenden Kundendatenbank mit mehr als 150.000 potenziellen Käufern können wir jeden Vermögensgegenstand zum angemessenen Preis veräußern.

Betriebsabwicklung
Dabei übernehmen wir für Dich die Abwicklung und kümmern uns um die Klärung komplexer Rechtsfragen, die internationale digitale und analoge Bewerbung, den Forderungseinzug sowie den Abholungsprozess.

Qualitätskontrollen
Wir setzen auf höchste Qualitätsstandards bei deinen Dienstleistungen. Deshalb unterziehen wir uns regelmäßig strengen Qualitätskontrollen durch renommierte unabhängige Einrichtungen. Wir sind TÜV-zertifiziert nach den Standards des Qualitätsmanagementsystems DIN EN ISO 9001:2015. Daneben sind auch unsere Sachverständigen vom BDSF geprüft und zertifiziert.

Name: Butch Law
Description:
Estate Planning for Real Life

Butch Law is a mobile estate planning law firm based in Greensboro, North Carolina, serving the Piedmont Triad and the broader state. We help individuals and families create Wills, trusts, powers of attorney, and healthcare directives that reflect their values, protect their loved ones, and bring peace of mind.

Our approach is clear, accessible, and rooted in real life - not legal jargon or fear tactics.

We work especially well with:

* Families with young children
* LGBTQ+ individuals and chosen families
* Child-free adults who want thoughtful, intentional planning

Butch Law is a mobile practice, which means we meet clients where they are - at home, virtually, or wherever they feel most comfortable. We're committed to making estate planning more human, more inclusive, and more doable.

Because no one should have to Google “what happens if I die without a Will” at 2 a.m.

 Learn more at [butchlaw.com](https://butchlaw.com)

Name: Chapter 3 Consultancy Pte Ltd
Description:
At Chapter 3, we believe that life is divided into three chapters. The first chapter is the beginning of our lives, where we learn and grow through our experiences. The second chapter is the time in our lives where we work hard, build a career, and accumulate wealth. The third chapter is the time where we reflect on our lives, and begin to think about what we want to leave behind for the people and the world that come after us.

We understand that estate planning can be a difficult and emotional process, but it is a critical part of preparing for the third chapter of life. Our mission is to help our clients plan for the future, pass down their values, and secure their legacy for their loved ones.

We are more than just a estate planning firm. Our comprehensive solutions go beyond just money to focus on what really matters - the values and memories that make up our clients' legacies. We believe that every family has a unique story, and we work closely with our clients to create customized plans that reflect their values and their vision for the future.

With our expertise in estate planning and a deep commitment to helping our clients create lasting legacies, we are proud to be the trusted advisors for many families in Singapore. At Chapter 3, we are here to guide you through life's third chapter, so that you can leave a lasting legacy for generations to come.

• Zuverlässigkeit: Wir arbeiten präzise und termingerecht, damit Sie stets den Überblick behalten.

Description:
We are IMG. We believe in the power that lies in all our hands to make a positive difference. Not just for now, but for generations to come. 

We believe we are unlike any other trust company - great words indeed - but these bold words are backed up by service levels that are second-to-none and an absolute commitment to work tirelessly for our carefully curated clients. 

We are driven by an unsurpassed commitment to doing the right thing. We bring together global expertise, and a deft touch, we help clients resolve challenging and complex situations and help project them forward, on a greater path.

Name: Paolo Gaeta e Associati
Description:
Studio specializzato in Trust, Pianificazione Patrimoniale e Consulenza Fiscale 

Paolo Gaeta & Associati è uno studio leader nella pianificazione patrimoniale, wealth management e consulenza fiscale internazionale. Offriamo soluzioni su misura per famiglie, imprenditori e investitori, garantendo la protezione e la crescita del patrimonio attraverso strumenti giuridici avanzati come il trust familiare e la gestione fiduciaria.

 I nostri servizi principali:
 Trust e Protezione Patrimoniale – Strutturazione di trust discrezionali, trasparenti e opachi per la gestione di patrimoni familiari e aziendali.
 Consulenza Fiscale Internazionale – Ottimizzazione fiscale e pianificazione strategica per clienti con asset globali.
 Pianificazione Successoria e Wealth Management – Soluzioni per la successione aziendale e la protezione del patrimonio familiare.
 Trust per Imprenditori e Holding Societarie – Separazione degli asset personali da quelli aziendali per minimizzare i rischi e garantire la continuità d’impresa.
 Compliance e Antiriciclaggio (AML) – Gestione delle normative fiscali e legali per garantire la conformità alle leggi italiane ed estere.
 Trust per Minori e Disabili – Strumenti giuridici per tutelare soggetti fragili e garantire la continuità del sostegno economico.

 Sedi: Milano, Napoli, San Marino, Tel Aviv
 Podcast "Trust Talks" – Approfondimenti con esperti sui trust e la gestione patrimoniale.
 Pubblicazioni & Eventi – Master e convegni per professionisti e clienti privati.

 Perché sceglierci?
Con oltre 30 anni di esperienza, il nostro studio offre soluzioni personalizzate per clienti privati e imprese, con un approccio innovativo e altamente specializzato.

 Contattaci per una consulenza riservata:  info@studiogaeta.com |  www.studiogaeta.com

Name: CorPa
Description:
For almost a quarter of a century, CorPa Treuhand AG has been a trusted name in fiduciary services, founded in 2000 by Karl-Heinz Hemmerle. We specialize in business formation, wealth management, and international tax strategy, combining our deep knowledge of Liechtenstein and international corporate structures with extensive experience across banking, fiduciary services, and industry.

At CorPa Group, we focus on providing flexible and carefully targeted advice, tailored to the unique needs of each client. 

Our core traditional services include:
	• Structuring and fiduciary services
	• Succession planning
	• Family offices
	• Philanthropy
	• Finance and accountancy
	• Consultancy services

We also lead in digital trust services, offering:
	• Digital custody
	• Fiat gateway
	• Staking
	• Tokenization
	• Blockchain transaction and compliance services
	• Blockchain consulting

CorPa Group is your reliable partner, guiding you through the complexities of wealth management and corporate structuring with integrity. With subsidiaries in Liechtenstein, Switzerland, Singapore, and the UAE, we ensure our clients receive consistent, high-level support wherever they are.

Med fokus på kvalitet, hållbarhet och service skapar vi miljöer där både människor och företag kan växa. 

Strävan efter en bättre vardag tillsammans – välkommen att hitta ditt nästa hem eller den perfekta lokalen hos oss!

Vi tänker långsiktigt även när det gäller hållbarhet och miljö. Därför ser vi till att ligga i framkant med smarta digitala lösningar och självklart har alla våra nyproducerade fastigheter en miljöcertifiering. Name: Rento Jaipur | Verified Rentals in Jaipur
Description:
Rento Jaipur is a new-age rental platform designed to transform the way people search for and rent homes in Jaipur. We aim to eliminate the age-old challenges of property rentals — high brokerage, lack of verified tenants/owners, incomplete property details, and endless back-and-forth between landlords and tenants.

At Rento Jaipur, we believe that renting a home should be simple, transparent, and trustworthy. That’s why our platform is built on three strong pillars:

1 Broker-Free Experience – No more paying unnecessary brokerage. Tenants can directly connect with verified landlords, saving both money and time.

2 Verified Ecosystem – Every tenant and landlord undergoes Aadhaar verification, ensuring a safe and secure community of genuine users.

3 Premium Properties Only – We focus exclusively on flats and homes in gated societies and premium localities across Jaipur, guaranteeing a high-quality rental experience.

 Why Choose Rento Jaipur?

 100% Aadhaar-verified tenants and landlords
 Broker-free, transparent process
 Premium flats and gated societies only
 No hidden costs, no fake listings
 Safe, secure, and hassle-free renting experience

Name: Custodius
Description:
Custodius was born from an estates lawyer's frustration with the state of will storage. Unhappy with the options of sending valuable documents home with clients or taking on the cost and liability of providing decades of free storage, she wanted something better. And so she founded Custodius, 
Custodius partners with estates lawyers to provide their clients with secure long-term will storage, while relieving them of the costs and liability. 
Better for the lawyer, better for their clients.

Name: Suraksha Dhan Trust

Suraksha Dhan Trust is a dedicated nonprofit organization committed to transforming lives through education, healthcare, skill development, and community empowerment. We believe that every individual deserves access to opportunities that foster growth, security, and self-reliance.

 Education  – We provide scholarships, free tutoring, and digital literacy programs to ensure that financial constraints do not hinder learning.

 Community Support  – Our initiatives include disaster relief, nutritional aid, and women's empowerment programs to uplift vulnerable communities.


At Suraksha Dhan Trust, we strive to create lasting impact by nurturing dreams and protecting futures. Join us in our mission to empower lives and transform communities!


Tagline 

"Suraksha Dhan Trust: Nurturing Dreams, Protecting Futures."

Her på siden vil vi løbende fortælle om de byggeprojekter, BRFfonden uddeler til og finansierer via Fonden for Håndværkskollegier, navnlig opførelsen af tre håndværkskollegier i Horsens, Herning og Roskilde.

Our goal is to demystify complex legal and tax issues, making them accessible and understandable for homeowners, property investors, and families. By creating awareness, we help individuals take the right steps with their legal advisors to protect their assets and ensure their loved ones are cared for.

Kapp Wills and Estates is not a law firm it is a platform for education, awareness, and practical guidance on the importance of proper estate planning.

Description:
The Zell Family Office (ZFO) is a family-focused office that supports the needs of the Zell Family, offering a range of services focused on enhancing their overall well-being, from their health to their finances. We’re reimagining what a family office should be by offering the Zell family a range of services. 

Our founder, Sam Zell, believed in exploring your potential and creating an impact. That’s why we aim to support his family — as well as our community and society — by enhancing their well-being.

ZFO is a division of Chai Trust, the private trust company for the Zell family. Chai has two primary divisions: The Zell Family Office and Equity Group Investments, which focuses on direct investing in privately held companies across various industries.

En installation som inte fungerar som avsett eller är felaktigt underhållen kan bidra till onödigt höga driftkostnader. 
Clim8 har energiteknik, inomhusmiljö och mätteknik som fokusområden. Genom vår helhetsförståelse säkrar vi att tekniska installationer fungerar optimalt, att onödig energiförbrukning undviks och att en god inomhusmiljö upprätthålls.

Tjänsteutbud:

- Energioptimering
- Radonutredningar/radonsänkande åtgärder

- Luktutredning

Det innebär att vi har all kunskap i huset och att vi finns med er från första spadtaget genom hela byggprocessen till de små justeringarna under hyrestiden. Vi har kompetensen för att du som hyresgäst ska känna dig trygg och sedd och strävar efter långsiktiga samarbeten. Allt för att du ska kunna fokusera på din verksamhet, vi tar hand om lokalerna.

- Contamos con un equipo de asesores con experiencia global, que brinda un servicio personalizado, transparente y confidencial.

- Trabajamos con empresarios, familias, personas de alto patrimonio, banca privada y family offices a nivel internacional.

90 110 tar ansvar för allt tekniskt underhåll, så att Ni kan fokusera helt på kärnverksamheten, oavsett tid och årstid. Description:
Melsen Fonden blev etableret i juli 2020 og har fire overordnede formål: at yde økonomisk støtte til personer, som på grund af sygdom eller andre ikke selvforskyldte forhold er i økonomisk trang, til sygdomsbekæmpelse og forskning i samme, til forbedring af dyrs forhold samt til samfundsmæssige og velgørende formål i almindelighed – alt sammen med afsæt i Nordjylland.

Melsen Fonden er i dag ledet af en bestyrelse bestående af formand Anker Laden-Andersen samt Kurt Ejgil Møller, Birgit Villadsen og Stiven Larsen.

Name: Alltax
Description:
Ganz persönlich und alles aus einer Hand: Treuhand, Steuern, Wirtschaftsprüfung und Unternehmensberatung. Das ist gebündelte Treuhandexpertise im Zentrum von Basel. Wir von der Alltax sind die ausgewiesenen Spezialisten für KMU. Engagiert, partnerschaftlich und leidenschaftlich arbeiten unsere Treuhandprofis verschiedener Disziplinen für unsere Kunden. Und genau diese Kunden haben uns in die Liste der «Top Steuerexperten & Treuhänder 2023» gewählt. 

Die Alltax ist eine Einheit mit zwei Unternehmen: Die Alltax AG Treuhandgesellschaft und die Alltax AG Wirtschaftsprüfung. Unser interdisziplinärer Austausch entdeckt Zusammenhänge, die andere nicht sehen und schafft Synergien zum Vorteil unserer Kunden. Dazu gehören vorwiegend KMU. Zudem betreuen wir Mandate von Grossunternehmen und arbeiten im Auftrag von Stiftungen, Vereinen, Verbänden und gemeinnützigen Organisationen. Wir sind Mitglied von «EXPERTsuisse» und «Treuhand Suisse» und entsprechen allen Berufs- und Standesregeln und erfüllen die höchsten Branchenanforderungen.

Välkommen till oss på Hushagen. Vi är ett fastighetsbolag som ägs av Borlänge kommun och verkar under samma marknadsmässiga former som andra fastighetsbolag. Vårt fokus ligger på att bygga stad. Det innebär att vi alltid har Borlänges bästa för ögonen. När vi köper, bygger och säljer fastigheter väger vi in fler värden än enbart de ekonomiska. Vi utgår helt enkelt från vad Borlänge behöver.

Kom gärna med dina idéer redan när de är på idéstadiet. När en möjlighet dyker upp vill vi gärna förverkliga den om det så innebär att fastigheter ska få fler våningar, behöver byggas om eller att bygga nytt. Hos oss är inga uppdrag för små eller för stora. Vi tillhandahåller kontors-, affärs-, utbildnings- och industrilokaler, liksom lokaler för offentlig verksamhet och föreningsliv. Vi samarbetar med Borlänge kommuns näringslivskontor. De hjälper dig med de kontakter du behöver för att dra igång din verksamhet, medan vi fokuserar på att du får en passande lokal.

Name: Edsvärd

Name: Pennington Law - Estate Planning & Probate
Description: Effective estate planning and administration is more than a financial matter. It is a way to protect the people you love while honoring the unique relationship you have with them. Hightower Trust Company and your Hightower advisor can help you pass your legacy to those you love without burdening them with administrative responsibility, so your story can live on for generations.

Hightower Advisors was founded in 2008 on the belief that clients’ needs come first, and as a fiduciary, we act in the client’s best interest. Recognizing our clients’ desire to work with their advisor to protect and grow their wealth for the benefit of future generations, Hightower acquired Salient Trust Company located in Houston, Texas, in 2018. From the roots of this local trust company, Hightower Trust Company was born, obtaining its national charter in 2022. Hightower Trust Company’s local roots and nationwide footprint enables us to provide trust services to all of Hightower’s advised clients while retaining the personal service you would expect from a local trust company. Working together with your Hightower advisor, we take the time to get to know you and your family, to understand your hopes and dreams, the lifestyle you want to provide for future generations, and any concerns you may have for their future, so that together, we can help your story become part of their story.

Name: Chatham Maritime Trust (Kent)
Description:
Chatham Maritime Trust is a unique organisation, set up to meet a special purpose
The Trust was formed in 1997 to take on the long-term management and maintenance responsibilities of the Chatham Maritime Estate, at the time one of the major urban regeneration sites in the country. Chatham Maritime Trust is a registered charity (no 1055710) and a company limited by guarantee. The Trust has four member organisations: Medway Council, HCA now known as Homes England and the Estate’s two occupier associations: St Mary’s Island Residents Association Ltd (residential) and South Maritime Residents Ltd (non-residential).

The member organisations each have rights of nomination for Trustee appointments (the HCA one and the others two each) and the Trustee Board typically also includes four or five “Independent Trustees” who are usually local professionals with relevant skills.

The Trust owns significant parts of the Chatham Maritime Estate, and acquires further sites as development completes. Eventually the Trust will own virtually all of the public domain of the Estate.

The Trust receives funding for maintenance of the Estate from three areas: South Maritime service charges, St Mary’s Island rentcharges and from the Trust’s own endowment funds. The maintenance expenditure at Chatham Maritime is in the order of a million pounds a year, and the Trust anticipates remaining as estate owner and manager at Chatham Maritime well into the 2100s.

Chatham Maritime Trust also plays a role in supporting the growing community at Chatham Maritime and community activities in the Medway Towns generally. The Trust does this through its Community Fund which it uses to promote events, and to sponsor or support community groups.

Name: Meezan Youth Organization MYO
Description: Meezan Educational Trust is a non-profit trustee organization that works to promote educational opportunities in the remote Gilgit-Baltistan region of Pakistan. Every year, the trust selects 40 students from the region’s most impoverished villages and provides them with a two-year scholarship to study in the Meezan Hostel in Karachi. During their stay in Karachi, they are provided with a safe and nurturing environment where they can focus on their studies without having to worry about the financial burden that would have been placed on them had they had to pay for tuition. Once the two-year scholarship has ended, these students are then given the opportunity to connect with a platform that will help them continue their studies and help them to find gainful employment. The trust provides its students with a mentorship program and career guidance, job placement resources, and access to a wide network of employers in the region. The trust also works to raise awareness of the importance of education and to spread the message that everyone, regardless of their background or financial status, can succeed in life if given the right resources and support.

Name: The Estate, Trust & Elder Law Firm, P.L.
Description:
The Estate, Trust & Elder Law Firm, P.L., is excited to announce that after 43 years our founding Attorney, Michael D. Fowler, J.D., LL.M., B.C.S., is finally moving into retirement and he found the perfect successor, Attorney Wesley R. Harvin, II, J.D., LL.M.

Wes grew up on the Treasure Coast and obtained his Juris Doctorate degree from the University of Florida, Fredric G. Levin College of Law in 2001. Wes continued his expertise by obtaining a Master of Laws in Estate Planning from the University of Miami.   But it is Wes’ 20 years of experience and his true passion for helping others that will continue with Mike’s legacy.

The Firm is uniquely positioned to provide outstanding service regarding crisis and advanced long term care planning including eligibility for Medicaid and Veteran’s benefits, essential estate planning and guidance through the long-term care continuum.  We have experts in Estate Planning, Trust Planning, and Estate and Trust Administration (probate).

We live in a time where Elder Exploitation is an epidemic. Every day a senior is being taken advantage of and we can help!  Florida has the most advanced laws to stop exploitation of our most vulnerable and loved citizens.  We can help families dealing with Senior Exploitation, Probate & Trust Litigation, Guardianships, and assistance with Tax Law for new Florida Residence.

With a combined 60+ years of experience, our Attorneys are poised to assist in all aspects of elder law, and we think anyone in the market for Estate or Elder Law services should check us out.

While no one wants to think about disability or death, establishing an Estate or Long-Term Care Plan and protecting one’s family from the potentially financially devastating expenses of long-term care is one of the most important steps you can take to safeguard yourself and your loved ones.

Name: SCA Portfoliomanagement GmbH
Description:
Unabhängig von den jeweiligen Werdegängen der einzelnen Mitarbeiter, Geschäftsführer und Gesellschafter haben sich im Team der SCA Portfoliomanagement GmbH Menschen zusammengeschlossen, die durch ähnliche Wertvorstellungen, hohe Ansprüche an eine  auf Vertrauen fußende Kundenbeziehung und gemeinsame Ziele zueinander gefunden haben.

Nachhaltigkeit, Transparenz, Bodenständigkeit, Expertise und Unabhängigkeit werden in der heutigen Zeit branchenübergreifend oft als Schlagwörter verwendet. In unserem Haus bemühen wir uns tagtäglich darum, diese Worthülsen auch mit Leben zu füllen und sich mit Blick auf die Firmenstruktur, die Kommunikation mit den Mandanten sowie die Arbeitsweise an diesen Maßstäben zu orientieren.

Bereits bei Gründung der Zweigniederlassung in Deutschland im Jahr 2015 haben wir uns auf unsere menschlichen und fachlichen Stärken besonnen. Dadurch treten wir im äußeren Erscheinungsbild dezent auf, um unseren Fokus auf die Betreuung von Bestandskunden, die Wertpapieranalyse und die Erarbeitung von Lösungen zu legen. Diese nachhaltige Herangehensweise erfordert auch einer gewissen Flexibilität und führt dazu, dass wir einen Großteil unserer Kunden auf Empfehlungsbasis gewinnen. So war es für uns selbstverständlich, neben der klassischen Vermögensverwaltung mit der Zeit auch Family-Office-Dienstleistungen anzubieten oder Stiftungen zu unterstützen.
 
Gerade bei der Verwaltung größerer Vermögen bedarf es sowohl eines gewissen Fingerspitzengefühls im Umgang mit Mandanten als auch einer klaren Argumentation bezüglich des Entscheidungsprozesses. Neben der jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung zeichnet uns, unser unternehmerisch- und familienorientierter Ansatz aus. Monetäre Ziele spielen in der Arbeitswelt eine gewisse Rolle, doch ist allen Mitarbeitern der SCA bewusst, dass nur ein mit Fleiß, Kompetenz und Hilfsbereitschaft gelebtes Arbeitsumfeld langfristigen Erfolg für unsere Kunden und damit für uns selbst garantiert.

Name: VGF Verwertungsgesellschaft für Nutzungsrechte an Filmwerken mbH
Description:
Die VGF ist eine nach dem Gesetz über die Wahrnehmung von Urheberrechten und verwandten Schutzrechten durch Verwertungsgesellschaften (Verwertungsgesellschaftengesetz – VGG) vom Deutschen Patent- und Markenamt zugelassene urheberrechtliche Verwertungsgesellschaft.

Sie wurde 1981 von Filmproduzenten und Filmverleihern mit dem Ziel gegründet, die ihnen und Filmurhebern durch das Urheberrechtsgesetz zugewiesenen Vergütungsansprüche und kollektiv wahrzunehmenden Rechte geltend zu machen.

Die VGF ist vor allem für Filmhersteller tätig. Sie nimmt aber auch die Rechte all derjenigen wahr, die ihre Rechte vom Hersteller eines Films ableiten, wie etwa Filmverleiher, Filmlizenzhändler, Weltvertriebsunternehmen u.a. Unter Filmherstellern sind selbstverständlich auch die Co-Produzenten eines Films zu verstehen. Die VGF nimmt allerdings nicht die Rechte an vorbestehenden Werken (Drehbuch, Musik) und an Fernsehauftragsproduktionen wahr.

Unsere Pflichtangaben, z.B. das Impressum finden Sie auf unserer unten verlinkten Website!

Erreichen können Sie uns auch unter: info@vgf.de

Name: Godinton House Preservation Trust
Description:
Godinton is a remarkable country house, nestled in the heart of Kent. Dating back to the 14th century, the house today reflects the tastes of the last owner, Alan Wyndham Green: it is designed to feel comfortable and more informal than other properties – a house, rather than a museum, so that visitors can imagine what life might have been like here.

Tours of the house are led by expert guides unravelling the 600 years of history and revealing an excellent country house collection of furniture, art, porcelain and curios.

Enjoy delicious homemade cakes, cream teas and refreshments in the old Billiard Room.

The famous yew hedge surrounds the formal gardens with the wild, Italian and walled gardens beyond, full of colour and interest through the seasons, maintained close to Blomfield’s original designs.

Events, courses and workshops are run throughout the year to be enjoyed by all – more details can be found in the ‘What’s On’ section of our website.

Godinton is an excellent teaching resource tailored to suit individual needs: please get in touch if you would be interested in working with us.

A working estate with lovely walks, close to the picturesque village of Great Chart, Ashford.

Het is een voorrecht om als nalatenschapscoach aan de slag te gaan en mensen te mogen begeleiden bij het ordenen van de nalatenschap. 

Een nalatenschap... Het klinkt als iets zakelijks, papieren, cijfers en regelwerk. Maar wie er echt even bij stilstaat, merkt al snel: het gaat over zoveel meer. Over herinneringen, familiebanden, wensen die je stilletjes koestert maar wellicht niet durft uit te spreken. Maar vooral, het goed verzorgd willen achterlaten van je dierbaren als jij er straks niet meer bent. En precies daarom is het zo waardevol om er op tijd over na te denken. 

Vraag je jezelf wel eens af?
 Of je familie straks voor onduidelijke of lastige keuzes komen te staan?
 Weet je zeker dat je partner en/of kinderen goed verzorgd achterblijven?
 Of het opstellen van een levenstestament wellicht voordelen biedt?
 Hoe moet ik "later" bij het overlijden van partner of ouder(s) alles geregeld krijgen?

 Bij deze en tal van andere nalatenschapsvragen, wil ik je graag bijstaan. 
Dus stuur me een bericht en ik zal zo spoedig mogelijk contact met je opnemen. 

#nalatenschapscoach #levenstestament #nalatenschap #estateplanning #financielerust #persoonlijkebegeleiding #vertrouwe

Estate Planning and Structuring: Crafting detailed plans to secure your legacy and ensure your loved ones are taken care of. The estate planning and structuring is at the heart of our practice. Asset Protection Planning: Implementing strategies to safeguard your assets from potential risks and liabilities. We understand that building wealth is only half the battle—protecting it is equally crucial. Our asset protection planning services are designed to shield your assets from potential risks and ensure your financial legacy remains secure for future generations.

Tax Benefit and Tax Flow Services: Optimizing your tax benefits and managing the flow of tax liabilities to maximize your financial efficiency. We believe that strategic tax planning is essential for maximizing your financial well-being. Our Tax Benefit Services are designed to help you navigate the complex tax landscape, ensuring you take full advantage of all available tax benefits while maintaining compliance with the law.

We also know that each client’s situation is unique, and we pride ourselves on providing personalized legal solutions tailored to meet the specific needs and goals of our clients. Our team of experienced professionals is committed to delivering the highest standard of service, ensuring peace of mind and financial security.

Connect with us to learn how we can assist you with your needs.

Name: HAAS Treuhand AG
Description:
UNSERE GESCHICHTE
Am 1. Januar 1985 nahm die Haas Treuhand unter der Leitung von Frau Hanny und Herr Hansjürg Haas ihre Tätigkeit auf. Sie konzentrierten sich einerseits auf die Verwaltung und Vermittlung von Immobilien sowie andererseits auf die Unternehmens- und Steuerberatung für KMU’s und natürliche Personen. Bereits per 1. Januar 1997 wurde die Einzelfirma mit sämtlichen Aktiven und Passiven in die HAAS Treuhand AG umgewandelt.
Während mehr als 30 Jahre seit der Gründung konnten die Inhaber auf der beruflichen Basis von Tätigkeiten als Steuerkommissär beim Kant. Steueramt Zürich, bei der Mieterschlichtungsstelle Rapperswil und der steten Weiterbildung (Steuerexperte, Fachspezialist Mehrwertsteuer, Finanzcoach, bzw. Immobilien-Treuhänderin) den meist langjährigen Kunden viele gute Dienste leisten. Für das Vertrauen und die Treue danken wir unserer Kundschaft herzlichst!
Am 1. Mai 2014 hat sich Frau Melanie Moor-Haas als Immobilien-Fachfrau der HAAS Treuhand AG angeschlossen. Sie leitet zusammen mit Frau Hanny Haas die Verwaltung und Vermietung sowie den Verkauf von Immobilien.
Am 1. Januar 2015 hat sich zudem Herr Roger Haas als Treuhänder mit Fachausweis der HAAS Treuhand AG angeschlossen. Er leitet den Bereich der Finanz- und Lohnbuchhaltungen. Seither konzentriert sich Herr Hansjürg Haas neu auf die Bereiche Steuern und Revision.
Die HAAS Treuhand AG hat per Anfang 2015 ihren Sitz an die Lenggiserstrasse 10 in Rapperswil-Jona (Kempraten) verlegt.

Name: PRASHANT FOUNDATION
Description:
As the founder of Prashant Foundation, I am deeply committed to creating a positive and lasting impact on communities that need it most. Established with a mission to drive change, Prashant Foundation is a nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering underprivileged individuals, advocating for social justice, and promoting sustainable development.

Our foundation focuses on education, healthcare, community development, and environmental sustainability. Through a combination of grassroots initiatives, strategic partnerships, and hands-on support, we work tirelessly to improve the quality of life for those in need.

Our key programs are designed to address the most pressing challenges faced by marginalized communities. From providing access to quality education and vocational training to ensuring basic healthcare services and promoting environmental awareness, we believe that everyone deserves the opportunity to live a life of dignity and purpose.

At Prashant Foundation, we take pride in our approach to sustainable development, emphasizing long-term solutions over short-term fixes. Whether it's helping families in remote areas gain access to clean water, supporting children with scholarships, or training women in skills for entrepreneurship, we are committed to making lasting change.

We also believe that collaboration is key—working closely with local leaders, governments, businesses, and fellow nonprofit organizations, we create integrated strategies that address the root causes of poverty and inequality. Our programs are data-driven, results-oriented, and always centered around the communities we serve.

As a founder, my vision for Prashant Foundation is to inspire others to take action, to be a beacon of hope for those who need it most, and to leave a legacy of compassion, equity, and empowerment. We are constantly evolving, always seeking new ways to make a difference, and committed to creating a world where every individual has the opportunity to thrive.

𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬

- Treuhand:
 Wir kümmern uns um die Erledigung Ihrer gesamten Buchführung und bereiten individuelle Reportings vor, damit Sie Ihre unternehmerischen Entscheidungen basierend auf zeitnahen und qualitativ wertvollen Informationen treffen und sich getrost Ihrem Kerngeschäft widmen können.

Wir führen sämtliche gesetzlichen und freiwilligen Revisionen unter Wahrung eines risikoorientierten Ansatzes effizient, zielgerichtet, gewissenhaft und termingerecht durch und halten stets die beruflichen Anforderungen an Zulassung und Unabhängigkeit ein. Nebst der Erfüllung der gesetzlichen Pflichten stehen wir Ihnen auch beratend zur Seite.

- Steuern: 
Steuern sind das Bindeglied zum Staat. Wir helfen Ihnen, die Steuern im gesetzlichen Rahmen zu optimieren. Sei dies mit dem Ausfüllen der privaten und/oder geschäftlichen Steuererklärung oder mit steuerplanerischen Massnahmen im Voraus. Dabei haben wir immer auch die finanzplanerische Gesamtsituation im Blick, um den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg langfristig zu sichern.

- Unternehmensberatung: 
Wir unterstützen Sie in der finanziellen Unternehmensführung in allen Unternehmensphasen. Dazu gehören beispielsweise Unterstützung bei Gründungen sowie Begleitung von Start-up-Unternehmen, Erstellung von Businessplänen, Kapitalbedarfs-, Finanz- und Liquiditätsplanungen, Unterstützung bei Unternehmenszukäufen, Fusionen, Abspaltungen, etc., Unterstützung bei Unternehmensverkäufen oder Coaching bei Sanierungen und Liquidationen. Wir übernehmen auch Verwaltungsratsmandate oder fungieren als Sparringspartner von Unternehmensinhabern oder Geschäftsführern in sämtlichen finanziellen Angelegenheiten.

På Nest Förvaltning strävar vi efter att göra ekonomisk förvaltning enkel, effektiv och modern. Vi erbjuder skräddarsydd lösningar inom förvaltning för både bostadsrättsföreningar, samfälligheter och privata fastighetsägare som vill optimera sin fastighetsförvaltning.

Med vår egenutvecklade styrelseportal och boapp moderniserar vi en traditionell bransch och tar förvaltningen till en ny nivå. Styrelseportalen ger föreningar och fastighetsägare full kontroll och transparens i allt från ekonomi och dokumentation till kommunikation med medlemmar och hyresgäster. Boappen förenklar vardagen för de boende genom smarta funktioner som anslagstavla, aviseringar och enkel tillgång till relevant information.

Med fokus på personlig service och digitala verktyg hjälper vi våra kunder med allt från ekonomisk förvaltning och administration till rådgivning och utveckling. Vårt mål är att skapa förutsättningar för långsiktig hållbarhet och trivsel – både för fastighetsägare och boende.

Vi är stolta över att vara en pålitlig partner som alltid sätter kundens behov i första rummet. Oavsett om du driver en bostadsrättsförening eller ett fastighetsbolag, kan du räkna med att vi levererar lösningar som förenklar din vardag och frigör tid för det som är viktigast för dig.

Name: Centrala Nacka
Description:
Centrala Nacka utvecklas till en stadsdel där det urbana och naturen möts på nya sätt, en stadsmiljö med större kontraster och variation, där naturen och den befintliga topografin får ta större plats och påverka både den fysiska miljön och den sociala miljön. Här får stadens dynamik möta naturens kraft.

Vi har utvecklat konceptet Naturban som en gemensam målbild och plattform för det vi vill skapa. Naturbant är det dynamiska mötet mellan natur och stad, där vår ambition är att förena det bästa av två världar i Nackas mest centrala läge med närhet till allt - natur, stadsliv, möten och kommunikationer. Här ska det vara självklart med tillgänglighet till både naturens lugn och stadens puls.

Vi utvecklar Centrala Nacka tillsammans
Utvecklingen är ett långsiktigt projekt som sker i flera etapper och som kommer att kräva ödmjukhet, tålamod samt nära och stark samverkan med fastighetsägare, byggaktörer, näringsliv, Nacka kommun och Nackabor.

Name: Krafthus

Vi vill vara mer än bara ett byggbolag. Därför erbjuder vi våra kunder allt från nyproduktion till projektutveckling, samarbeten och investeringsanalyser. Vi vill vara en komplett partner genom hela projektet, och håller kunden i handen hela vägen från start till mål.

Självklart tar vi vårt ansvar för miljö och omvärld i en bransch som är förenad med stora utsläpp och stor miljöpåverkan. Därför jobbar vi ständigt med produkt- och processutveckling för att skapa ett effektivt och hållbart byggande. Vårt mål är att vara en byggare som ligger i framkant för att med rent samvete kunna ta med byggbranschen in i framtiden. Ur ett större perspektiv hoppas vi att de byggnader som vi producerar kan bidra till en positiv utveckling och ekonomisk tillväxt som på sikt leder till bättre hälsa, bättre livsvillkor(arbetsmiljö?) och ett bättre samhälle.

Vi är en del av Torngrund Group, en fastighets och byggkoncern som 2022 har en omsättning på ca 600 mkr och en balansomslutning på 300 mkr. Våra kontor hittar du i Stockholm och Nyköping.

Name: Zorgeloos Nalatenschap
Description:
Een zorgeloze erfenis - een geschenk voor later!

Ik ben Gera van Brunschot. Sinds 2009 ben ik als bewindvoerder en mentor betrokken bij het regelen van financiële zaken en zorg bij cliënten.
Vanuit mijn werk weet ik hoe ingewikkeld het kan zijn, als cliënten te maken krijgen met een nalatenschap die niet goed is geregeld.

Wat wil de overledene qua uitvaart? Hoe moeten de persoonlijke spullen worden verdeeld? Wanneer er niets is vastgelegd, zullen de erfgenamen dit zelf moeten invullen zoals ze denken dat de overledene het zou hebben gewild.
Het gebeurt dan ook regelmatig dat de familierelaties op scherp komen te staan. Naast de emoties van het overlijden, komen er pijnpunten uit het verleden terug boven. Zeker met geld in het spel, nemen ruzies en onrust vaak de bovenhand tijdens het afwikkelen van een nalatenschap.

Bij het overlijden van mijn eigen ouders, zag ik hoeveel rust het kan geven als de wens van degene die overlijdt duidelijk is. Het geeft niet alleen de nabestaanden rust, maar ook rust aan de persoon die overlijdt.
Mijn moeder wist precies wat ze wilde. Qua uitvaart, maar ook qua verdeling van persoonlijke spullen. Ze heeft alles ook met haar kinderen doorgesproken. Er was rust.

Mijn vader sprak niet over zijn naderende overlijden. Niemand wist wat hij precies wilde. Er was ook niet echt iets vastgelegd. Daarom moesten wij, als erfgenamen, na zijn overlijden zelf uitzoeken wat hij zou hebben gewild.
Het had ons een zoektocht bespaard, als hij hier wel iets over had vastgelegd.

Als RegisterExecuteur bij Zorgeloos Nalatenschap help ik u graag verder.
Samen zoeken we uit wat uw wensen en opties zijn. Zowel met een levenstestament als een testament na uw overlijden.
We kijken welke stappen er wel of juist niet kunnen worden gezet voor uw nalatenschap.
Zo wordt uw nalatenschap zorgeloos. En uzelf zult rust krijgen, omdat alles goed is geregeld.

Name: Planify
Description:
Nous gérons les risques financiers des propriétaires. 
Que vous soyez confrontés à des défis liés à la retraite, à une succession, à une faillite ou encore à un divorce, ce concept vous apporte des solutions concrètes et personnalisées pour protéger vos actifs et optimiser vos décisions financières.
Voici les grandes lignes de notre concept :
    Retraite : À ce stade de la vie, les revenus diminuent, et il devient difficile pour les nouveaux retraités de maintenir leurs dettes immobilières. Nous vous aidons à anticiper et à trouver des solutions pour préserver votre patrimoine.
    Succession : L’héritage peut s'avérer complexe. Quels impôts sont à prévoir ? Quels travaux sont à entreprendre ? Quelle est la valeur réelle du bien hérité ? Nous vous accompagnons à chaque étape pour clarifier les démarches et alléger le fardeau.
    Faillite : Lorsqu'une faillite survient et que l'immobilier doit être vendu, il reste toujours des possibilités de sauvetage. Nous vous aidons à envisager les différentes options afin de préserver une partie de votre patrimoine.
    Divorce : Dans ces moments difficiles, faut-il vendre la maison ? L’un des partenaires peut-il la reprendre ? Nous analysons votre situation et vous aidons à prendre les meilleures décisions pour raccourcir une procédure souvent complexe et fastidieuse.

Name: JWK Treuhand & Revisions AG

Name: Astra Fiduciary Services
Description:
Introducing Astra Fiduciary Services: A new approach to trust management.

Astra Fiduciary Services is a team of experienced Financial Advisors redefining what it means to serve families. As a Corporate Trustee or Trust Executor, we provide a family-friendly, personalized alternative to hiring the traditional bank to serve as your family's trustee. 

At Astra, we act in your family’s best interest, hiring qualified Financial Advisors, CPAs, and Estate Attorneys to ensure your legacy is protected and your wishes are fulfilled. Who better to oversee your trust assets than a Financial Advisor holding other Financial Advisors accountable?

With Astra Fiduciary Services, you can trust that your family’s future is in the hands of professionals who truly understand your goals and values.

Let us help you safeguard your legacy. Trust is earned, not inherited.

Name: Strategic Fiduciary Consultants
Description:
At Strategic Fiduciary Consultants (SFC), we are the Fiduciary Fixers for the unique and often overlooked challenges in trust administration. Our mission is to fill the critical gaps left by traditional services, providing specialized non-legal support that protects trustees, empowers beneficiaries, and safeguards family legacies.

Our unique value proposition lies in our ability to navigate the gray areas where trusts, families, and legal complexities collide. We serve as a neutral, expert partner, offering a range of services designed to provide clarity and security.

Our Core Services:

Beneficiary Resource Consulting: We act as a neutral liaison and educator, providing a much-needed resource for beneficiaries to confidently manage their trust benefits without conflict. We help trustees avoid the role of "de facto therapist."

Fiduciary Audit/Review: We provide an objective third-party audit of trust administration to ensure compliance and mitigate legal risks—an essential service for inexperienced family trustees.

Trust Protector: Our firm provides a long-term, independent oversight solution, ensuring a trust's longevity and safeguarding beneficiary interests across generations.

Fiduciary Litigation & Expert Witness: In high-stakes disputes, our deep expertise provides credible analysis and testimony to support your case.

Court-Appointed Roles: We handle complex, unique fiduciary roles that require an independent, experienced professional.

We are your trusted partner in navigating fiduciary responsibility. Let us help you solve the issues you didn't know you had.

Learn more at https://stratfidconsultants.com/.

Name: V&G Trustee
Description:
V&G Trustee draws on the strengths of a unique team of long-standing experts with Swiss roots and diversified expertise to deliver excellent advice on the use of trusts – a pivotal tool in family succession – legal protection, corporate governance and generational transition.
“This is a time of significant change – propelled by the new FINMA regulations – in the sector of independent asset managers and trustee companies. We are convinced that combining skills and objectives is the optimum choice when it comes to offering our clients increasingly sophisticated services for families and businesses.”
Antonio Mandrà - Chairman, V&G Trustee / CEO and Managing Director of VECO Group

“Our experience and expertise in the world of trusts enable us to exploit the multiple uses offered by this legal construct of Anglo-Saxon origin. Adopting this key approach to personal and professional protection is V&G Trustee’s answer to an increasingly uncertain and complex future – and is beneficial for both our Swiss and our international clients.”
Fabio Gaggini, Attorney at Law - Of Counsel V&G Trustee
Founder and Managing Partner of the law firm Gaggini & Partners

Vi har både lägenheter och kommersiella lokaler, ca 1350 lägenheter och ungefär 90.000 m2 lokaler. Våra hyresgäster är allt från skolor, kontor, restauranger och verkstäder till hotell. Name: P-tjänst Sverige
Description:
P-tjänst är parkeringsbolaget med lokal förankring. Vi är väl etablerade sedan snart 40år tillbaka och har byggt upp en stor kunskap och kompetens inom allt som rör parkering.

Vi erbjuder kundanpassade lösningar där vi tillvaratar ert behov av en väl fungerande parkeringsanläggning. Vi erbjuder försäljning och distribution av digitala tillstånd via web och app som utöver parkering, automatiskt kan ge ut virtuella nycklar till dörrar, garage, cykelrum, gymlokaler eller andra låsta
utrymmen. Genom vårt samarbete med Parakey slipper du all administration av din anläggning men har fortfarande full kontroll. 

En förutsättning för en hög servicegrad är hög tillgänglighet. Målet är nöjda kunder – det uppnår vi – genom att vara lätta att nå, arbeta nära kunden och att vara lyhörda för varje kunds varierande behov. Av yttersta vikt i vår verksamhet är att vinna förtroende. Ett korrekt utförande och uppträdande med välutbildade parkeringsvakter skapar förutsättningar att vara goda representanter för er som vi arbetar för. 

Våra resurser omfattar allt från parkeringsövervakning till betalsystem med biljettautomater eller bomsystem, projektering och förvaltning. Vår huvudsakliga sysselsättning är parkeringsövervakning men vi gör mycket mer än så:

Vi erbjuder kundanpassade helhetslösningar med både fysiska och digitala parkeringstillstånd samt olika kameralösningar.
P-automat: Installation drift och service.
Felanmälan: Personligt svar med åtgärd även på kvällar och helger.
Mynt: Tömma, räkna och redovisa.
Kontokort: Administrera transaktioner, tömma, räkna och redovisa.
Vägmärken: Allt som behövs på en parkering, och lite till.
Vägmarkeringar: Måla p-rutor och symboler på marken.
Skrotbilar: Ser vi till att de transporteras bort.
P-dekaler: Får ni av oss, snabbt och lätt.
Projektering: Detaljplanearbete, arkitektritningar, planering.

Tveka inte att kontakta oss för mer information och referenser!

Trust officers, attorneys, CPAs, CFPs, private bankers, planned-giving officers, and insurance professionals all gather six times a year to take off their “corporate representative” hats and delve into the many issues that are faced while planning and resolving trust, estate, and investment cases.

We like to think that being a part of WNYEPC gives our group members a professional edge!

Founded in 1947, the Western New York Estate Planning Council boasts a membership of professionals working in the Western New York area, that specialize in legal, accounting, insurance, investment, trust and valuation professions. The Council is committed to expanding estate planning knowledge and expertise, growing professional contacts & relationships, and, ultimately, enhancing the community by facilitating superior client service.

Des forêts réenchantées qui réconcilient les humains et le Vivant.

Rassembler des coopérateur·trice·s afin d'acquérir des forêts pour reconstituer des massifs abondants et diversifiés.

Partager équitablement les ressources et les usages de la forêt, dans le cadre d’une gouvernance partagée. 

Assurer la bonne santé des sols et écosystèmes forestiers. 

Retrouver un équilibre entre les différentes fonctions écologiques, sociales et économiques de la forêt.

Name: Kerala brahmana Sabha
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Kerala Brahmana Sabha (KBS)! Established in 1970, KBS is dedicated to serving the Kerala Iyer community, a sect of Tamil Brahmins, across the 14 districts of Kerala. Our mission is to foster unity, uphold cultural traditions, and address the concerns of our community.

The history of KBS traces back to the early 18th century, when Tamil Brahmins migrated to Kerala, establishing Agraharams and Samooha Madoms to preserve their rituals and customs. These institutions played a vital role in community life, supported by generous endowments and active participation in local temple functions.

In 1946, under the leadership of prominent figures like Sri. V.P. Madhava Rao and Sri. Anantharama Iyer, the Travancore Brahmana Sabha was formed to unify these efforts. By 1970, the All Kerala Brahmins’ Association was established, eventually evolving into Kerala Brahmana Sabha. Our organization has since grown, with vibrant activities and committees extending across the state.

Join us in our journey of empowerment and collective progress, as we continue to honor our heritage and work towards the betterment of our community

We provide a range of easy to understand, bespoke, family controlled trust solutions that could save your family thousands of pounds by planning now for the future. 

Wealth preservation planning involves the protection of your estate from tax and other social impacts, both during your lifetime and for future generations. 

Our trusts deliver maximum tax benefits to protect estates from unnecessary taxation, thereby protecting wealth as it passes down through future generations.  

By using trusts, you can be assured that the full value of your estate will pass to your chosen beneficiaries protecting your partner, children and grandchildren, giving you peace of mind.

Name: Executor Navigator, LLC
Description:
We provide day-to-day assistance to Executors and Administrators with the multitude of tasks associated with managing and settling an estate or trust.  These services range from basic, hands-on things from digging through boxes of papers, canceling services, or couriering collectibles to an appraiser through preparing estate accounting reports for the Estate’s attorneys and CPAs, keeping beneficiaries in the loop, and all the other the day-to-day tasks in between required to settle an estate.

Our goal is twofold - (1) to reduce the stress and worry of those administrating the estate and (2) to maximize the value of the loved one's legacy.

The people doing the work have solid experience in business management, accounting, finance, investments, taxation, and project management. Our value to the client and the family is not just "doing" the work, but leveraging our experience to provide proactive guidance, knowing what information you need, and an overview to prevent issues - and to direct the clients to the right folks if problems arise that may be beyond the scope of our service.  We have a list of vetted, trusted professionals and tradespeople that we can tap to assist, saving both the untold hours of research and the risk of an unreliable vendor.

That said we do not make commissions or any sort of monetary compensation for referrals. If we recommend a course of action, it is because it benefits the Estate.

Name: A&D Nalatenschapsmediation
Description:
Grief and division play an important role in settling an estate. With death, emotions and material issues can come together. Next of kin deal with this in different ways. As a result, the parties involved may no longer be able to work things out for themselves.
Guidance from a professional estate mediator can then make all the difference. A&D does this with attention to the needs of all involved, the underlying intentions and the relationships between them.

Name: Capacity Plus GmbH

Treuhand, Buchhaltung & Controlling für Schweizer KMU, Handwerk & Start-ups – praxisnah, digital und effizient.

Viele KMU haben ihre Buchhaltung im Griff – aber nicht ihre Marge pro Auftrag laufend im Blick.
Rechnungen werden zu spät gestellt, Nachträge gehen verloren oder kommen zu spät, Preise werden nach Gefühl gesetzt – und die Liquidität schwankt.

Wir richten Treuhand, Controlling und – wo sinnvoll – ERP so ein, dass unsere Kunden ihre Margen in Echtzeit sehen, sicher kalkulieren und profitabel wachsen.

Unsere Leistungen:
• Treuhand & Buchhaltung nach OR
• Projekt- & Auftragscontrolling (Marge pro Auftrag, Nachtragsstandard)
• Liquiditätsplanung: kurzfristig (Wochen) bis langfristig (Jahresprognosen)
• ERP-Umstellung (z. B. Bexio → SORBA), MWST-Abstimmung & Reporting

Unser Nutzenversprechen:
 Klare Zahlen, gesunde Liquidität, saubere Margen – und Sicherheit für deine Entscheidungen.

Für wen?
• Bau- & Handwerksbetriebe (5–250 Mitarbeitende)
• Start-ups in der Wachstumsphase

Name: The Rowborough Estate
Description:
The Rowborough Estate is a substantial 1,500‑acre ring‑fenced sporting estate nestled within the picturesque Undulating Hills of the Isle of Wight’s Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty. It includes let farms (both AHA and FBT leases), in‑hand woodland, residential cottages, and various lettings. 

It boasts a thriving and commercially driven pheasant shoot, making it a well‑known destination for game shooting enthusiasts. 

Located amidst the steep valleys of the Isle of Wight Downs, it’s renowned for both partridge and pheasant shooting: partridge over dry chalk grassland (beginning in September) and mixed pheasant/partridge drives through broadleaf woodland from October.

Städia grundades 1998 och har idag cirka 100 medarbetare. Vi har vårt säte i Täby och arbetar i hela Storstockholm samt Uppsala, Göteborg, Halmstad, Malmö och Helsingborg. Vi har sedan starten hjälpt våra kunder med alla former av kvalitativ lokalvård. Tack vare vår kunskap och erfarenhet kan vi hjälpa dig som kund med samtliga utmaningar i er nuvarande och framtida lokalvård. Städia är auktoriserat av Almega samt ISO-certifierade sedan 2010. Samtliga medarbetare har SRY-utbildning, våra arbetsledare genomgår även PRYL-utbildning.

Vi har under våra verksamma år utvecklat en djup förståelse för våra kunders unika behov. Städia AB har idag ett utbud av tjänster från de mer enkla kontorsstädsuppdragen till komplexa städuppdrag som måste möta företag och myndigheters standard. Våra uppdrag och tjänster innefattar bland annat: 

•	Kontorsstädning
•	Galleria- och butiksstäd 
•	Verkstad- och bilhallstvätt 
•	Fastighet- och trappstäd 
•	Bygg- och entreprenadtvätt
•	Fönstertvätt 

Inga uppdrag är för stora eller för små för oss. Vi har en lång historik med att utveckla specialanpassade tjänster och upplägg för att passa varje individuell kund efter deras unika behov.  

Städia är en del av Nyttagruppen AB

Name: Treuhand Service Ochsner GmbH
Description:
Im Jahr 1993 hat sich der Gründer der Treuhand Service Ochsner GmbH, Markus Ochsner, als Treuhänder selbständig gemacht. Als moderne Treuhandunternehmung sind wir auf die Beratung und Betreuung von Klein- und Mittelunternehmen, KMUs und Privatpersonen ausgerichtet. Wir beraten, unterstützen und entlasten unsere Kunden mit umfassenden und nachhaltigen Dienstleistungen in den Bereichen Buchhaltung, Steuerberatung und Unternehmens- und Vorsorgeberatung.

Im heutigen, sich immer schneller verändernden und komplexen Wirtschaftsumfeld verstehen wir uns als Ansprechpartner für Klein- und KMU-Unternehmer in sämtlichen Unternehmensfragen. Bei uns erhalten Sie praxisrelevante Antworten auf Ihre unternehmerischen Fragen. Wir erachten es als unsere stetige Verpflichtung, uns mit gezielter Weiterbildung auf dem neusten Stand der geltenden Gesetzgebungen zu halten und kennen so die Chancen, Risiken und Veränderungen im komplexen Wirtschaftsumfeld. Wir bieten Ihnen Qualität, Sicherheit und Kontinuität in der Mandatsbetreuung. Wir bieten persönliche, vernetzt denkende Beratung durch eine ganzheitliche Vorgehensweise. Die langfristige Zusammenarbeit mit vielen unserer Kunden bestärkt und zeigt uns, dass wir mit unserer Haltung, Kompetenz, Treue und Vertrauen auf dem richtigen Weg sind. Ständige Mandatsleiterwechsel gibt es bei uns nicht.

Wir beschäftigen gut ausgebildete Mitarbeiter mit den Zusatzausbildungen Fachausweis TREUHAND und WIRTSCHAFT. Fachwissen und absolute Flexibilität zeichnen uns seit vielen Jahren aus. In nahestehenden Fachbereichen können wir auf ein seit Jahren aufgebautes Netzwerk von Spezialisten zurückgreifen. Der sich auch auf Stufe KMU immer mehr abzeichnenden Veränderung der vernetzten unternehmerischen Work-Flows, Thema digitale Transformation, stellen wir uns voll und ganz. Wir halten nicht an Status Quo und Vergangenheitsstandards fest, sondern beraten und begleiten unsere Kunden in das sich abzeichnende Zeitalter eines papierlosen Büros.

Name: Dragonfly Wills and Estate Planning
Description:
At Dragonfly Wills and Estate Planning, it is important to us to provide a friendly, professional, informed and trustworthy service to all of our clients. We take the time needed to explain things so that you are confident in the estate planning solutions you choose.

The Dragonfly signifies the transformation of a loved one’s soul from physical manifestation to spirit. In other cultures, it is a symbol of good luck and prosperity. This makes it the perfect emblem for our company that cares about helping loved ones prepare for their transition in a way that enables them to pass on their estate to those that they intend.
 
At Dragonfly Wills, we are conscious that the ‘sometimes complex’ nature of relationships within families can evoke uncomfortable emotions. We recognise that each family member is an individual with differing needs and will always advise accordingly. Writing a Will can be very daunting, especially where there are complicated circumstances. However, our aim is to make the entire experience as easy and comfortable as possible, leaving you with peace of mind.

It is our aim to help you enjoy life in the here and now, without the nagging thought that you ‘really must be getting around to sorting out your affairs.’

Im Rahmen der Betreuung von Unternehmen gehört es auch zu unseren Aufgaben, die Kunden bei der Nachfolgeplanung sowie bei seiner Vorsorge wirkungsvoll und umfassend zu unterstützen.

Vereine, Verbände sowie Veranstaltungen in Sport und Kultur können wir in Administration umfassend unterstützen. Name: The Peace of Mind Estate Organization, Inc.
Description:
On any given day, 100 million Americans are processing the loss of a loved one or providing care for someone who's reached a point of incapacity. No more hearing them say "I love you" or "I'm proud of you" with that glimmer in their eyes. No more family stories about the generations. No more explanations or advice. 

In that gap we stand with empty hands, wishing we had something to bring us support, and sometimes, even closure depending on the situation.

If you're among the 100 million loved ones, you can probably relate:

According to our research over 4 years, HALF of the requests for information we have as bereaved or caregivers fall under the categories of "sentimental" or "practical" requests, which are in addition to the fundamental financial or legal concerns we face.

The sentimental and practical requests span a range from simple requests for locations, names, and plans, to more complex needs like hearing a favorite family story or saying goodbye.

What they all have in common is this: If the person we lost had been a client of Peace of Mind, they would've had an opportunity to efficiently organize, capture, and share these details before they were needed. And then securely store and share them according to strict privacy and timing requirements.

~~~

We put our client at the center of an estate preparation strategy unlike any other. We complement the work of a range of estate planning and health professionals serving our clients: lawyers, accountants, planners, brokers, counselors, home health and hospice, and many others.

Because our sole focus is on facilitating the exchange of information from the client to surviving loved ones, we can promote efficiency, privacy, and legacy with confidence.

We give each client permission to use their voice, heart, and mind, to build a legacy on an organized structure of sentimental and practical information to help their loved ones manage a time in the future when they'll live without their guidance and support.

Name: Preservation Vail
Description:
ur goal at Preservation Family Wealth Vail is to help individuals and families navigate the pitfalls of the estate planning process. I have teamed up with an expert Denver-based trust and estate law firm, a professional insurance expert and financial planning with years of experience. While our firm does not manage money for our current clients, we work with all major wealth investment firms and philanthropic advisors.

As an attorney practicing law and raising a family in Eagle County for more than 30 years, estate planning was a service I always provided to local families. A few years ago, I became the trustee and health care surrogate for my own mother suffering from Alzheimer’s disease and learned the pitfalls of elder care and wanted to create a comprehensive estate planning service. Elder-care abuse is at an all-time high since COVID and leaves loved ones vulnerable to exploitative health care practices. Our heath care, legal system, and government benefits are ill equipped to manage the complexity of issues facing families. One example is that Medicare does not pay for long-term care, which results in depletion of assets without proper planning.

These topics are highly strategic in family wealth management and require a depth of experience, but most importantly patience and compassion.

There are legal and financial measures my team can facilitate for families to ensure this transition runs smoothly. We are excited to provide these comprehensives services to our community.

Name: Silverbrook Manor
Description:
Silverbrook Manor is a farm estate steeped in history dating back to the late 1700s. From its colonial origins to the present day, Silverbrook Manor seamlessly blends the timeless charm of the past with a forward-thinking, sustainable approach to agriculture. 

As an incubator farm and container for growth, our passionate owners, artisan farmers, and stewards of the land are dedicated to revitalizing traditional methods of agriculture while exploring new opportunities for the next generation of farmers. At Silverbrook Manor, we strive to be a successful model of a holistic farm, with a wide range of products that include apiaries,  livestock, fresh eggs, mushrooms, microgreens, medicinal plants, vegetables, ﬂowers, and herbs, all grown organically through a regenerative and holistic lens. 

Education, innovation, and restoring biodiversity are key values that underpin all our activities at Silverbrook Manor. We will support a range of sustainable farming techniques, from learning gardens and market gardens to wild pastures,  food forests, and biomass yards for compost and mulch management. 

Silverbrook Manor is open to new opportunities and serves as a container for growth for innovative agricultural ventures. Are you interested in submitting a proposal,  volunteering, or farming with us?

SURE is a diversified technology company founded in 2025, specializing in creating a trusted ecosystem for the real estate and transportation markets in Central Asia. The company operates across three key segments: P2P platform for individuals, B2C services for end consumers, and B2B solutions for corporate clients. Our trust services include legal transaction support, market participant verification, and transaction security through escrow services.
SURE's core business focuses on eliminating structural problems in the traditional rental market for real estate and automobiles. We develop a technology platform integrated with government systems that reduces operational costs for market participants from 50% to 10% through process automation and intermediary elimination. The company provides a full cycle of services: from property and user verification using artificial intelligence to financial services, including installments, insurance, and payment management.
SURE's strategic objective is to establish a dominant position in Uzbekistan's P2P economy market with subsequent regional expansion. The company plans to achieve 200,000 active users and gross merchandise value of $15 million by 2027, while maintaining sustainable profitability at 55% EBITDA margin. Our business model is based on diversified revenue streams: commission fees, subscription services, and additional financial products.

SURE - многопрофильная технологическая компания, основанная в 2025 году, специализируется на трастовых услугах в сфере недвижимости и транспорта в СНГ. 
Работаем в сегментах P2P, B2C и B2B, обеспечивая юридическое сопровождение сделок, верификацию участников рынка и безопасность транзакций через эскроу-сервисы.
Разрабатываем технологическую платформу, интегрированную с государственными системами, для аренды недвижимости и автомобилей. Предоставляем полный цикл услуг: верификации объектов и пользователей дофинансовых сервисов, включая рассрочки, страхование и управление платежами.

Name: Future Interest Alliance
Description:
Future Interest Alliance (FIA Trust) is a modern fiduciary services company built to bring professional, ethical, and accessible trust management to beneficiaries and families across Texas.

Founded by estate planning attorneys Drea Haire and Amy Lefkowitz, together with CEO Summers McKay, FIA Trust was created to solve a longstanding gap in the market: most trustees and corporate fiduciaries focus only on large, high-value trusts — leaving thousands of families without experienced, reliable, or transparent trust administration.

We believe every trust deserves professional management, regardless of size.

Our team combines decades of experience in estate planning, probate, fiduciary administration, legal strategy, and organizational leadership. 

FIA Trust provides:

• Court-appointed trust administration (including minors and protected persons)
• Private trust management
• Professional fiduciary services
• Collaboration with estate planning attorneys
• Clear communication, consistent reporting, and proactive oversight

We partner closely with families, attorneys, and courts to ensure beneficiaries receive competent stewardship, financial clarity, and long-term stability.

At our core, FIA Trust exists to deliver integrity, accountability, and skill to an industry where all three are often inconsistent. We handle the complex work so beneficiaries can focus on living, healing, and planning for the future.

FIA Trust — fiduciary management, done right.

Name: ARAMIS TRUST SA
Description:
Welcome to ARAMIS TRUST SA, a boutique Swiss Trustee firm based in the heart of Geneva, licensed by the Swiss financial-markets regulator (FINMA).

ARAMIS TRUST SA has a rich history, originally established as the Geneva branch of EXPERTA SA, a reputable Swiss fiduciary company created in 1933 by a group of wealthy families. 

Following a management buy-out in 2008, we continued our journey as a boutique consultancy firm specializing in trust and fiduciary services, estate planning, tax and corporate advisory services. 

In January 2016, ARAMIS TRUST SA joined FIDINAM, a private consulting group founded in Lugano (Switzerland) in 1960, offering tax, business, real estate, and digital consulting services to companies, entrepreneurs, and individuals. 

This move allowed us to consolidate our market position with prospects for growth and specialization, particularly in providing tailored Swiss Trustee Services for multi-generational entrepreneurial families.

We offer a comprehensive range of trustee services, including:

- Estate Planning: assisting clients in structuring their estate plans to ensure the seamless transfer of wealth to the future generations. 

- Tailored Trustee Services in Switzerland: creating, managing and administering trusts with meticulous attention to detail and ensuring compliance and fiduciary responsibilities are met.

We invite you to discover the difference that a small, dedicated and supportive team can make.

Name: Claim My Legacy - Nationwide Estate Planning Experts
Description:
Claim Your Legacy. Before Someone Else Does. 

"If you do not have a plan, the government has one for you."

That single sentence has kept estate planning attorneys in business for decades - because it's brutally true.

When you die without a will or trust, the state steps in with its rigid intestate laws. Your spouse might get less than you think. Your kids could be forced into guarded accounts until 18. Your unmarried partner? Often nothing. Your favorite charity? Forgotten. And the taxes, court fees, and family fights? They feast on what you spent a lifetime building.

At Claim My Legacy, we refuse to let that happen to you.
We’re the modern, no-nonsense estate planning platform that makes protecting your wealth, your family, and your wishes ridiculously simple - and actually affordable.

In under 30 minutes, from your phone or laptop, you can create attorney-built, state-specific:

• Last Will & Testament
• Revocable Living Trust
• Financial Power of Attorney
• Healthcare Directive & Living Will
• Digital Asset Access Instructions
• Guardianship Designations for children & pets
Your documents are reviewed by licensed attorneys, stored securely in the cloud, and can be updated anytime life changes - marriage, kids, divorce, new business, crypto fortune, you name it.

No $5,000 attorney retainers. No dusty filing cabinets. No procrastination excuses.

Just unbreakable peace of mind knowing that when your time comes, your loved ones won’t be in probate hell - they’ll be celebrating the legacy you intentionally left them.

You worked too damn hard to let bureaucracy claim what’s yours.
So take 15 minutes today. Build your plan. Sign it digitally. Sleep like a baby tonight.

Because the only person who should decide your legacy is you.
 Claim My Legacy. Yours to protect. Yours to control.
www.claimmylegacy.com  

#EstatePlanning #WealthProtection #LegacyPlanning #TrustAndWill #FinancialFreedom #FamilyFirst #ClaimMyLegacy
