A happy client makes us happy. We believe in being upfront and open with both our consignors and buyers. While we can tailor any of our projects to our consignors needs, we also want to make sure we are meeting and exceeding their expectations. For our buyers, we are always brainstorming new events to create an experience when they come see us. And we just get giddy when we are able to call them because something on their wish list has arrived.

Name: The Legacy of Love: Estate Planning Simplified for Mothers
Description:
If something happened to you tomorrow… would your family know what to do?

Estate planning can feel overwhelming. It’s easy to keep putting it off, thinking you’ll get to it tomorrow. You know it matters, but you’re not sure who to trust or where to start.

Only 1 in 3 families have an estate plan in place. That statistic is sobering when you realize death is the only guarantee in life. Not taking action can cost your family time, money, and peace.

‘The Legacy of Love’ podcast simplifies estate planning for mothers in the sandwich generation—those raising children while caring for aging parents—so you can plan with confidence, ditch the overwhelm, and leave a legacy that reflects your values and your vision.

Episodes air Mondays and Wednesdays.

In each episode, you’ll:
  • Learn from heart-led experts what a thoughtful estate plan really includes 

 • Navigate hard topics like challenging family dynamics and end-of-life care

  • Discover practical tools beyond your estate plan to reduce overwhelm, support your decision-making, and plan comprehensively with clarity and confidence

Hosted by Sara Ecklein—a Licensed Professional Fiduciary, private trustee, and mother—this podcast offers guidance that goes far beyond legal documents. Because legacy isn’t a destination; it’s a living practice that evolves as you do.

Don’t wait for a crisis to start your estate plan. Start today—with intention, clarity, and love.

 First time listener? Start with fan-favorite Episode 2: Estate Planning With Heart.

 Interested in being a guest? Contact us at: info@trustandhonor.co

Name: SWM AG
Description: SWM AG, based in Vaduz, specializes in brokering the purchase and sale of valuable precious metals. Thanks to our specialist knowledge, many years of experience and our ability to react quickly thanks to our purchasing expertise, we create the best returns for our clients. Your precious metal holdings are separated from the assets of the companies working for you. This provides complete protection against insolvency. The precious metal supplier delivers precious metals exclusively from audited and renowned refineries that comply with the London Good Delivery Standard. The six-eyes principle applies when entering the high-security vault. The following persons must be present when entering: a representative of the company operating the high-security vault, a representative of a Swiss security company and a representative of the precious metal supplier. In addition to securing the storage, the Swiss security company is also tasked with reporting on the volume of stored precious metals to an independent, external auditor at regular intervals. The auditor checks the total stocks. At the end of the first calendar year since their purchase, each customer receives the annual audit report together with the statement of accounts.

Name: ArcKernē Fiducium
Description:
ArcKernē Fiducium operates as an independent fiduciary and trust administration platform, serving private mandates requiring disciplined execution and long-term structural integrity.

The firm is responsible for the administration, maintenance, and protection of fiduciary structures, providing institutional-grade execution to uphold complex ownership, trust, and estate arrangements.

Fiduciary Scope: ArcKernē Fiducium does not provide investment advice or strategic design. Its mandate is limited to fiduciary execution, acting as Trustee, Protector, or Administrator in strict accordance with governing documents, regulatory obligations, and conflict-free standards.

By isolating fiduciary administration from advisory and investment functions, ArcKernē Fiducium ensures fiduciary independence, audit-grade accountability, and structural integrity across all administered mandates.

Name: Investment Albania
Description:
Objevte svůj budoucí druhý domov u moře v Albánii 
Jsme tým se základnami v ČR i v Albánii. Tým, pro který je investování do nemovitostí a řízení rizik běžnou praxí. CEO Jan Seidl zastával funkci vedoucího poradenství v oblasti řízení rizik pro Českou a Slovenskou republiku v rámci společnosti Deloitte.

S podnikáním v Albánii máme dlouholeté zkušenosti a velmi dobře známe lokální trh. Na rozdíl od externích společností jsme si vybudovali nadstandartní vztahy s místními developery a dodavateli. To umožňuje našim klientům získat nemovitosti za atraktivní ceny, ale se službami na špičkové úrovni a bez starostí. 

Komunikujeme ve třech jazycích (českém, anglickém i albánském), velmi dobře se orientujeme v právním systému Albánie, ale smlouvy uzavíráme pod EU legislativou. To vše přináší klientům vyšší ochranu.    

Zaměřujeme se na nové nemovitosti, ideálně ještě ve výstavbě, kdy investor může navrhovat změny. Kvalitu provedené práce kontrolujeme osobně.

Albánie je země, kde stále platí, že dobré vztahy jsou pro business nejdůležitější. My si na takových vztazích zakládáme na obou stranách - s developery i investory.

Name: Heritage Estate Specialists
Description:

Heritage Estate Specialists is a provider of bespoke estate planning services facilitated through our legal professionals who specialise in the administration of deceased estates as well as being registered financial planners.

Through our experience we are familiar with the difficulties and frustration arising out of the winding up of a deceased estate caused by unforeseen delays and hindrances which can arise. Our mission is to ensure that the loved ones of the deceased can grieve their loss while continuing to focus on their own affairs, all while leaving out the extensive stress associated with the winding up of a deceased estate.

Life Files

As an important part of the planning process Heritage Estate Specialists assists clients with compiling a Life File. The Life File is imperative to ensure that the aforementioned problems are dealt with and is vital with regards to the smooth winding up of the estate.

Heritage Estate Specialists provides individuals with the peace of mind that should they pass away, all the necessary provisions have been put in place to ensure that their loved ones are taken care of whilst also taking care of the burden of winding up a deceased estate.

Unser Ziel ist es, euch mit den Kapitalmärkten vertraut zu machen und tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Marktlandschaft zu geben.

Unser Business-Modell besteht darin, einmal pro Woche ein kompaktes, fundiertes Makro-Update zu veröffentlichen. Darin analysieren wir die wichtigsten Entwicklungen, zeigen spannende Investmentideen auf und liefern unseren Abonnenten den bestmöglichen Input für fundierte Anlageentscheidungen.

Wir sind derzeit ein junges, engagiertes Team von drei Personen, das mit Leidenschaft und Weitblick an den Kapitalmärkten agiert. Unser Anspruch ist es, Wissen zu teilen, Mehrwert zu schaffen und langfristig erfolgreich zu investieren gemeinsam mit euch.

Name: aftercare partners
Description:
At aftercare partners, we believe that true care extends far beyond the service itself. Families face a long journey after losing a loved one, filled with emotional healing and logistical responsibilities. Our mission is to bridge the gap between these two worlds, offering compassionate, hands-on support during the difficult times that follow.

Founded by professionals with over 25 years of experience in the funeral and aftercare industry, aftercare partners was created to provide seamless assistance to families during pre-planning stages and post-service transitions. We specialize in helping families manage estate needs, probate processes, mail and utility cessation, property downsizing, home preparation, and grief counseling—ensuring no detail is overlooked.

Our services begin even before a loss occurs. During pre-planning, we offer families practical solutions and advice to complement the pre-paid funeral arrangements they’ve already made. By addressing these needs early, families gain peace of mind knowing their affairs are organized and prepared.

Following a funeral, the real work begins for many families. Our dedicated team steps in, offering personalized outreach and guidance to assist with everything from managing important paperwork to coordinating home sales and relocations. By providing continuous support, we help alleviate the overwhelming stress families often feel when handling post-service responsibilities alone.

Partnering with aftercare partners allows service providers—whether funeral homes, hospice agencies, nursing homes, or adult living centers—to extend their care beyond their immediate role. This partnership enhances the overall experience for families by providing seamless support during life’s most challenging transitions.

By integrating aftercare partners into your service offerings, you create a comprehensive care network that addresses families’ needs long after their initial interaction with your organization.

Name: Death Readiness
Description:
Whether planning ahead or navigating the responsibilities of administering an estate or trust, Death Readiness offers expert support and advocacy to simplify complexity, reduce unnecessary legal costs, and help individuals and families make confident, well-informed decisions.

WHO I AM
I’m Jill Mastroianni. For more than a decade, I worked as a trusts and estates at top law firms. Today, I specialize in supporting women who are ready to stop avoiding estate planning, and start owning it.

WHAT IS DEATH READINESS?
It’s about more than having a will, trust, or advance directive. It’s about agency. About honoring what you want, how you want to be cared for, and what you want to leave behind. We put you at the center of your story.

WHO THIS IS FOR
Women carrying the weight of everyone else’s future:
- Raising kids while helping your parents
- The go-to person for everyone else’s emergencies
- Tired of Googling things like “Do I need a trust?” at midnight
- Ready to take your estate plan out of the “someday” pile

WHAT I DO
- Help you get clear on what you need (and don’t)
- Break it down, step by step.
- Find the right estate attorney
- Join legal meetings to ask the hard questions
- Handle follow-up and follow-through
- Translate legal-speak into plain language
- Make sure your plan reflects your real life

WHY IT MATTERS
Because what you want matters. And because your voice and your values deserve to lead the conversation.

HOW TO START
Book a free 15-minute call: deathreadiness.com/scheduling
Email: jill@deathreadiness.com
Phone: 248-266-5595

Name: Bridge Legacy
Description:
Independent Strategic Advisory for Families, Founders, and Global Investors.

Bridge Legacy is a private advisory firm that exists to serve one interest only: the investor’s.

We are independent of banks, product platforms, and intermediaries. We do not sell. We do not distribute. We do not represent providers. We operate with a single alignment—contractual and structural—to the long-term advantage of the investor.

Where banks push products, and family offices often drift into operational entanglements, we provide strategic clarity. We help clients decide where to live, how to structure, where to allocate, and how to protect. Every recommendation, negotiation, or connection we offer begins and ends with one filter: does this serve the investor’s strategic interest?

Our role is quiet, focused, and durable.

Not a vendor. Not a broker.

A strategic right hand, built for trust.

We serve those who must see the whole picture—heads of families, private entrepreneurs, investors with generational intent. What we ultimately deliver is not just strategy, but visibility: a unified dashboard from which to navigate.

When others sell complexity, we build clarity.

We are the bridge to legacy.

Name: Thompson Trustee Services
Description:
At Thompson Trustee Services we act as an impartial, long-term fiduciary for ultra-high-net-worth families—empowering each generation to turn financial strength into lasting fulfillment. We bring the discipline of trust administration together with a human-centered approach, working alongside your existing advisors rather than selling investments or products.

What we do

Onboarding – A focused review of financial structures, estate documents, and goals to clarify intent and align all stakeholders.

Trust Administration – End-to-end estate settlement and ongoing trust operations, coordinated with legal and tax professionals for smooth, thoughtful distributions.

Independent Trustee – Neutral leadership that upholds the trust’s purpose while supporting the people it was created to benefit.

Real Estate Specialization – Management or liquidation of residential and commercial holdings, maximizing value for beneficiaries.

We serve families nationwide from our base in Denver, providing clarity, continuity, and confidence across generations.

Name: Paradigm Legacy Planning, APC
Description:
We understand you are BUSY and you value efficiency. You want to make sure your children would be taken care of in the best way possible. That is our focus as well. We give you access to a personal family attorney so you can have the guidance you need to maintain a life of prosperity.

At Paradigm Legacy Planning, our team offers personal and comprehensive estate planning services. We believe in developing lifelong relationships with our clients and their families. We start all our plans by empowering our clients to get legally and financially organized. Driven by integrity and passion to make a meaningful difference, we take additional steps to ensure our clients' plans work when they need it most. We empower our clients to preserve their legacy beyond their financial wealth, through legacy interviews. 

We encourage communication with our clients so you never have to be afraid to call with a quick question. Most of our services are billed on a flat-fee basis and agreed to in advance, so there are never any surprises.

In addition, We ensure your plan continues to work throughout your lifetime. We coordinate funding to ensure none of your assets will end up going through a long, expensive court process or lost to the state because they were missed after your incapacity or death.

When you call our office, you’ll get your question answered right away. If you need to schedule a more in-depth call with your personal attorney, a call will be scheduled when you're ready so we can make the very best use of your time. 

Life happens! If you are ready to make informed decisions for the people you love, then we would love to speak with you. We look forward to serving your family.

Effizienz: Unsere Prozesse sparen Ihnen Zeit und Ressourcen.

Name: Repton Estate Planning
Description:
Repton Estate Planning provides professional estate planning services to families and professional advisors across the UK.

Founded by Imran Ashraf, a Fellow Chartered Financial Planner with 20 years of wealth management experience, we specialise in will writing, trust planning, inheritance tax strategies and Lasting Powers of Attorney.

OUR APPROACH

Clear, transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Professional expertise delivered with modern efficiency and personal care.

Imran holds Fellow Chartered Financial Planner status (FPFS) and is studying for Chartered Tax Advisor qualification, dual-chartered credentials that are exceptionally rare in the estate planning sector.

With 20 years advising families at HSBC, St. James's Place and Tenet, we understand complex financial affairs, high-net-worth estates and the importance of protecting your family's legacy.

SERVICES

- Will Writing (single, mirror, trust-structured)
- Trust Planning & Property Protection  
- Inheritance Tax Planning & Mitigation
- Lasting Powers of Attorney
- Estate Reviews & Executor Guidance

WORKING WITH PROFESSIONAL ADVISORS

We work closely with IFAs, accountants, solicitors, mortgage advisors and other professional advisors to support their clients with expert estate planning. Clear communication, transparent fees and professional service that protects your client relationships.

WHY ESTATE PLANNING MATTERS

Imran became executor for his father's estate and saw first-hand how poor planning creates stress for families. That personal experience shapes how we work with every client with clarity, care and genuine understanding of what families experience.

Name: 5 Pines Law
Description:
At 5 Pines Law, we are passionate about providing comprehensive estate planning services tailored to your unique needs. We understand that planning for the future involves making critical decisions about your assets, your legacy, and the well-being of your loved ones. That’s why our firm is dedicated to offering personalized legal solutions that align with your values and long-term goals.

With years of experience in estate planning law, our skilled team is here to guide you through the complexities of asset management, will creation, and trust establishment. We take the time to listen to your concerns, understand your priorities, and develop a plan that ensures your wishes are carried out precisely as you intend. Our approach is centered on building lasting relationships with our clients, rooted in trust, respect, and clear communication.

At 5 Pines Law, we know that peace of mind comes from knowing your family’s future is secure. Our mission is to provide you with that assurance by crafting estate plans that not only protect your assets but also honor your legacy. Whether you are looking to create a will, set up a trust, or explore other estate planning options, we are here to support you every step of the way.

We believe that estate planning is about more than just legal documents—it’s about preserving what matters most to you. Our team is committed to helping you navigate the legal landscape with confidence, providing the guidance you need to make informed decisions. Let us help you safeguard your legacy and provide for your loved ones, so you can focus on living your life with the peace of mind that comes from knowing everything is in order.

At 5 Pines Law, your future is our priority. Contact us today to learn how we can help you protect your legacy and secure your family’s future.

Name: One Step After
Description:
One Step After is a digital platform that simplifies estate planning and after-loss management giving families clarity, organization, and peace of mind during one of life’s most challenging transitions. Estate planning firms and other professionals use One Step After as a comprehensive resource to offer their clients, enabling clients to self-serve and get answers to common questions, avoiding the cumbersome back-and-forth.

Born from personal experience, One Step After was created after our founder lost his father and realized how fragmented and confusing the estate process can be. What should be a time of reflection and healing often turns into a maze of documents, deadlines, and decisions. 

Our mission is to change that.

With One Step After, users of all types can organize personal, legal, and financial information, create guided estate plans, and navigate the estate settlement process with a step-by-step  guide after a loved one passes away. 

One Step After brings together everything needed to plan ahead and manage what comes next: in one secure, easy-to-use space.

•	For families: One Step After provides structure, guidance, and tools to reduce stress and uncertainty while handling estates, saving thousands of dollars in expensive professional fees. 

•	For professionals: From estate planners and attorneys to financial advisors and hospice organizations, One Step After offers a seamless, client-facing resource to support planning, streamline guidance, and enhance service delivery.

By serving individuals planning an estate, families navigating a loss, and the professionals who guide them, One Step After bridges the gap between planning and execution, creating a more organized, confident, and compassionate experience for everyone involved.

Name: Family Loyalty Estate Sales, LLC
Description:
Family Loyalty Estate Sales, LLC is a family-owned and operated estate liquidation company based in Myrtle Creek, Oregon. Founded in 2022 by the Henderson family, the company brings over 65 years of combined experience in the antiques and collectibles industry. 
Services Offered
Family Loyalty Estate Sales provides a comprehensive suite of services to assist clients with estate transitions, including:
•	On-Site Estate Sales: The team manages every aspect of the sale, from organizing and pricing items to advertising and hosting well-attended events. 
•	Estate Liquidations & Buyouts: For clients seeking a quick exit, the company offers full estate buyouts or connects clients with buyers interested in entire estates.
•	Downsizing Assistance: They help individuals transitioning to smaller homes by efficiently managing the downsizing process.
•	Clean Outs: The company offers cleanup services, including trash removal and property cleanup, leaving homes broom-swept and ready for the next phase.
•	Consignments: For unique and valuable items, Family Loyalty Estate Sales provides consignment services at their store, assisting clients in getting the best value for their possessions. 
•	Janitorial Services: They offer janitorial services, including home and property cleanup, trash removal, and pressure washing.
•	Real Estate Connections: Through established relationships with local real estate agents, they can connect clients with professionals to assist in selling their homes.
Online Presence
Expanding their reach beyond in-person services, Family Loyalty Estate Sales maintains a trusted online presence through their eBay store, where they sell a variety of items, including movies, toys, jewelry, artwork, and antiques. This platform allows them to continue sales even after on-site estate liquidations, ensuring that valuable items are marketed to a broader audience. 
Community Engagement
Located in the historic town of Myrtle Creek, Oregon, on Main and 2nd.

We specialize in residence and citizenship programs through investment, supporting our clients in obtaining Golden Visas, advantageous tax residencies, and alternative citizenships. Our team provides complete guidance for changing tax residence and optimizing international positioning.

Our approach is based on five fundamental pillars:
1. Initial consultation to understand goals and needs

4. Implementation of identified solutions

In the event that you were to become incapacitated through serious illness or injury, disability, stroke or dementia, who would you want looking after your property, finances, health and welfare? 

Your family that know and love you, or the local authority?

Most people would answer “family” but, for this to happen, you need to create a Lasting Power of Attorney (LPA) before you become incapacitated. 

LPAs are not just for the elderly! 
An LPA is perhaps, equally as important as your Will. 

So much so, that here at Belvedere LPAs we believe that putting an LPA in place is a fundamental step in safeguarding your family’s future.

For all things LPAs, Wills, Trusts and Estate Planning contact us now!

Name: Lenox Wealth
Description:
As a leading player in the renewable energy finance sector, Lenox facilitates the monetization of solar investment tax credits (ITCs) by connecting developers with investors seeking tax benefits. We have invested tens of millions of dollars in solar tax equity globally, and saved clients millions of dollars in taxes by doing so.

Lenox Wealth also establishes and manages private family trusts in Nevada. We are an attractive and beneficial alternative to public institutional trust companies, offering flexibility, privacy, and control unavailable with traditional trust companies.  Many clients simply do not fit inside the box of a traditional trust company, and are not served well by the retail trust company structure.

Smaller clients with estates and trusts consisting of domestic equities, bonds, or mutual funds are fairly simple to administer.  Larger and more diversified clients with limited partnerships, private equity, yachts, planes, high-value art, or with international holdings, are far more complex, and a private family trust company is the best entity to manage these estates.

Commonly, attorneys, investment advisors, or accountants act as the trustee and administer trusts for their client, though it’s not their primary interest, expertise or sought-after role. Their time is ideally spent advising clients, not managing trust complexity. 

Lenox assumes this administrative burden by establishing and managing the trust company for a client, and partnering with advisors, so they can focus their efforts and expertise for their clients in areas where they can serve them best.

Lenox Wealth is your partner in Nevada, allowing your client to take full advantage of the best trust situs in the USA.  No matter where in the world a client lives, partnering with Lenox enables them to take full advantage of the best asset protection, greatest tax savings, and strictest privacy protections available today.

Name: Klintholm Gods
Description:
Godset har været i familien Scavenius eje i næsten 225 år og Carl Gustav Scavenius er 7. generation og gift med Inger Marie siden 2010.

I 2015 skiftede vi indre by i København ud med Østmøn for at drive og bo på Klintholm Gods. Vi er begge involveret i alle Klintholms aktiviteter og værdsætter, at vi som familie med 3 børn lever og bor i en spændende virksomhed med fokus på vækst og udvikling. 

Klintholm er i dag på 1.406 hektar hvor vi driver landbrug, skovbrug, jagt, husudlejning og turisme. 

Vi har fokus på grøn udvikling, og derfor er vi gået ind i et meget vigtigt og spændende projekt omkring rewilding af godsets jorde. Vi har derfor omlagt 300 ha. til økologi, og er i gang med at sikre, at det til evig tid forbliver natur/overdrevsarealer. Vi har herefordkøer, som plejer og opretholder den sårbare og pressede lysåbne natur. Herford racen er en vigtig del af vores identitet, da vi var de første i Danmark til at importere den. ”Restproduktet” af naturplejen er saftige bøffer af højeste kvalitet.  Gårdbutikken på Klintholm sælger kødet samt et udvalg af andre produkter fra Møn og Danmark.

Name: Done Once Lab
Description:
Done Once Lab is building the Legacy Asset Locator to solve a quiet but very real problem:
when someone becomes incapacitated or dies, the people they’ve legally appointed to help often have no clear picture of what exists, where it lives, or how to begin.

Bank accounts, insurance policies, retirement plans, subscriptions, digital assets, business tools, and online accounts are scattered across providers and devices. A will may define who inherits — but it rarely shows what actually exists or how to find it. The result is confusion, delays, and unnecessary cost for executors, powers of attorney, and families at the exact moment they need clarity.

The Legacy Asset Locator is a structured, non-legal system that creates a clear, read-only map of what you own and where it lives — without storing passwords, documents, or sensitive personal information. It gives the right people a starting point to act, whether during incapacity or after death.

The system is designed for busy professionals, parents, and small business owners who have both real-world and digital assets, but limited time to organise them. It’s also built for the executors, powers of attorney, and advisors who are expected to step in and manage things without guesswork.

Our aim is simple:
to make it easier for the people you trust to do the job you’ve asked them to do — calmly, clearly, and without unnecessary stress.

Name: Guardian Estate, LLC
Description:
Estate Planning is one key element of any retirement strategy, helping ensure that your legacy is one of family harmony, regardless of the size of your estate. Without careful preparation, misunderstandings can cause a rift in the family you’ve spent your life protecting.

Whatever your priorities – preserving assets for future use, tax-advantaged wealth transfer, providing for your grandchildren, or something else entirely – we can work with you to build a plan that fits your needs and may help maintain family harmony after you’re gone.

Creating a clear and thoughtful strategy for your legacy is more complex than simply managing estate taxes or drafting a will. Various methods and tools can help protect your finances and ensure your wishes are followed – with a minimum of family friction.

In addition, both term and cash value life insurance and long-term care insurance policies may be options to consider. These policies can be designed to serve different helpful functions.

Overall, preservation of family harmony and your wealth and assets requires a coordinated effort. Guardian Estate, LLC. is uniquely positioned to help provide financial peace of mind to you and your loved ones.

Leave a legacy of family harmony, regardless of the size of your estate.

Name: Reality Costa del Sol
Description:
Do dnešní doby jsem ve Středomoří prožila 11 let, se zastávkou v Praze. Tam jsem si v průběhu 10 let vybudovala realitní činnost založenou na doporučení. V roce 2018 jsem se přestěhovala s celou rodinou do jižního Španělska, na pobřeží Costa del Sol. Nashromáždila jsem v realitách 15 let zkušeností.

Mým domovem je dnes Casares Costa u Estepony.
Sama jsem si nejdříve ve Španělsku nemovitost pronajala. Mezitím jsem hledala vlastní bydlení. Mezitím se asimilovala do španělského prostředí. Řešila školní vzdělání. Zakusila zdravotní péči. Jednala s místními úřady a bankami. Otevřela účet v bance. Zřizovala internet. Vyřizovala přihlášení k odběru vody, elektřiny. Hledala řemeslníky a částečně rekonstruovala vlastní bydlení apod.

Dnes díky tomu pomáhám zorientovat se klientům z ČR a Slovenska ve španělském systému, ušetřit čas a finance.

Při jednání s klientem dám hodně na vlastní cit. Jsem slušná, čestná, spolehlivá a dotahuji věci do konce. Mám ráda kvalitu.

Name: Mandalina Vadisi
Description:
Mandalina Vadisi Ekolojik Tarım Turizmi Yerleşkesi, İzmir’in Seferihisar İlçesi’nde kuruludur. Mandalina Vadimizde gayrimenkul geliştirme projesi olarak, yaklaşık 100 dönüm arazide 272 kişi ekolojik tarımla uğraşabilecektir.

Seferihisar, 13 tane Mavi Bayraklı plajı ile İzmir’in en çok mavi bayraklı plaja sahip ilçesidir. Zeytin ve narenciye ağaçları ile çevrili bölgenin önemli geçim kaynakları arasında zeytin, üzüm ve mandalina üreticiliği bulunmaktadır. Ayrıca her yıl kasım ayında düzenlenen Mandalina Festivali de Mandalina’ nın ilçe ekonomisi için ne kadar önemli olduğunu gösteren keyifli bir etkinliktir.

Mandalina Vadisi Ekolojik Tarım Turizmi küresel ısınma, çevre kirliliği ve benzer olumsuzlukların doğaya verdiği zararlara karşı doğal ürünler üretmeyi ve tüketmeyi amaçlamaktadır. Mandalina Vadisi Projesinin en temel amaçlarından biri de, doğaya karşı taşıdığımız sorumluluğun yerine getirilmesidir. Bu sorumluluk, topraklarımıza sahip çıkmak, onları korumak ve gerçek amaçlarına uygun kullanmaktır. Üretmekten çok tüketmeye odaklandığımız bu dönemde sürdürülebilir bir yaşamın anahtarının doğaya dönmek olduğunu benimsememiz gerekmektedir. Mandalina Vadisi size bunun için güzel bir fırsat sunuyor. Mandalina vadisinin verimli topraklarında hayatınızı sürdürürken hem şehrin karmaşasından uzaklaşabilecek hem de hangi koşullarda üretildiğini bildiğiniz, kendi yetiştirdiğiniz ürünleri tüketebileceksiniz.

Bu üretim süreci içerisinde vadi boyunca sizin için ayrılmış, mandalina ağaçlarıyla yeşillendirilmiş alanlara dilediğiniz gibi tiny house, çadır veya karavan konumlandırabileceksiniz.

Hadi gelin özümüze dönelim.

Doğanın bize bizimde doğaya ihtiyacımız var.

Name: Karagounis Foundation
Description:
Founded in 2019 by Presidential Decree, the Dimitrios and Eleni Karagounis Foundation exists to reduce systemic inequality in access to education and economic opportunity for youth in Greece. Rooted in a deep belief that talent is equally distributed—but opportunity is not—the Foundation supports students from economically disadvantaged backgrounds to pursue high-quality education in Greece and abroad.

Its core mission is to fund scholarships and educational pathways that empower young people to access, continue, and complete undergraduate, graduate, and postdoctoral studies. The Foundation particularly invests in students with strong academic potential who face financial, geographic, or social barriers to educational advancement.

More than a scholarship fund, the Foundation serves as a vehicle for long-term capacity-building and social mobility—supporting the next generation of Greek leaders, thinkers, and change agents through education, mentorship, and trust.

Name: Unruh & Co.
Description:
Brooke Unruh graduated with highest honors from Oklahoma City University School of Law and has been practicing in OKC and Edmond for more than 15 years. 

In her 10 years of experience as a title attorney, she examined deeds, leases, mortgages, loan documents, and probate agreements. Through this work, she saw firsthand what happens when someone passes away with a plan versus without a plan or when legal documents are unclear.

She also worked in the oil and gas industry, where she primarily worked with operators to determine legal ownership of land. Now, she uses that industry experience primarily to help individuals with questions about mineral rights and ensure proper payouts from operators.

Her extensive exposure to a wide variety of legal documents and, more importantly, the consequences of those legal documents, led her to start her own firm helping individuals and families make sense of the process and find clarity in their past, present, and future.  

Brooke thrives on details and clear communication. Her clients describe her as thorough, approachable, and a good communicator. She works closely with her clients to ensure every detail is covered and that her clients always know what’s happening with their legal issue.

Name: PoolParty
Description:
PoolParty | Location de piscines, spas et jacuzzis entre particuliers - Écologie et bien-être

Chez PoolParty, nous croyons que la détente et le respect de l’environnement peuvent aller de pair. 

Nous offrons une plateforme innovante permettant aux propriétaires de piscines, spas et jacuzzis de les louer facilement à des particuliers. Ainsi, nous créons une communauté de partage qui favorise une utilisation responsable des ressources tout en offrant des moments de bien-être inoubliables. 

Nos valeurs :

 Écologie : encourager un usage raisonné des piscines privées, éviter le gaspillage et maximiser leur utilisation.
 Bien-être : permettre à chacun de profiter d’un espace de détente proche de chez soi.
 Communauté : connecter les passionnés d’eau, qu’ils soient propriétaires ou locataires.

Vous êtes propriétaire d’une piscine ou vous rêvez d'une après-midi au soleil ? Rejoignez-nous et plongez dans l’expérience PoolParty !
